name_en: 🎶🥖Medium Baguette Bag. Calfskin with a grain texture is hand-stitched with large matching topstitching in the same color. Silver-finished metal hardware. Adorned with an FF clasp. The bag comes with a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, suitable for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
name_cn:
🎶🥖Medium Baguette Bag. Calfskin with a grain texture is hand-stitched with large matching topstitching in the same color. Silver-finished metal hardware. Adorned with an FF clasp. The bag comes with a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, suitable for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
Size: 20-5-13cm Grain•
